title: Irish Beef Fajitas
description: A flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring tender Irish beef, sautéed with spices and served with warm flour tortillas.
instructions: 1. Slice the Irish beef into thin strips and season with fajita seasoning.
2. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the beef for 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the sliced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
4. Add a pinch of sugar to balance the flavors and cook for 1 more minute.
5. Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the fajitas by placing the beef and vegetable mixture onto the tortillas.
